Home / Internal Tools & Admin Panels / NocoDB

NocoDB — open source alternative

Open source Airtable alternative — turn any DB into a spreadsheet UI.

Strengths

  • Works on top of your existing SQL database.
  • Quick docker deploy.
  • Multi-view (grid, kanban, gallery).

Weaknesses

  • UI polish lags Airtable.
  • Advanced automation is in the paid tier.
  • Occasional migration friction between releases.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

NocoDB is used as an alternative to

Retool

Build internal admin panels and tools fast.

See all alternatives →

Airtable

Spreadsheet-database hybrid with rich field types and views.

See all alternatives →
